meaning: distance measuring equipment 测距装置
examples: Remind dme to post that letter.
DME volume set to more believable level.
HA5528A laser DME (distance measurement equipment) is a measuring instrument of high accuracy.
After federal inspectors detailed the depth of DME fraud, CMS designated South Florida a demonstration project.
Notably, 2Q was the first full quarter post Lucentis approval in DME in Jan-2011.
